privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating synthetic traffic demand consisting of exactly 160 standard vehicles and 40 HOV (High Occupancy Vehicle) vehicles. The agent must create a route file at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/hov_demand.rou.xml, a TraCI execution script at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/run_hov_sim.py, output trip info to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfo.xml, and perform analysis yielding average trip durations written to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/hov_analysis.txt. No external dataset is provided; the data is entirely generated by the agent during the task.
